description: Put your best feet forward with these Evander oxfords from rockport. These shoes feature a premium waterproof leather upper, padded tongue and collar for comfort, and a removable polyurethane footbed that aids air circulation. These classic oxfords are perfect for formal wear and give a well groomed look when paired with pants, shirts or suits. Upper Premium waterproof leather upper that keeps your feet dry and comfortable Tonal stitching and moc toe for an office-ready appearance jersey lining is a soft, knitted fabric that feels great against the foot Padded collar and tongue help prevent lace bruising and blisters Traditional central lacing for a comfortable customised Fit Midsole Removable cushioned footbed to support an orthotic Kinetic Air Circulator footbed offers patented active air circulating technology keeping your feet cool and comfortable Mild elevation on the heel of the footbed for feel of a massage Outsole Polyurethane outsole offers lightweight and durable support Hydro-shield construction offers breathable, waterproof protection for a healthy foot environment shoe careUse a leather brush to dust off the dirtUse a leather shoe polish to make the shoes shineKeep shoes away from sunlight
